# Real-world PNG fixtures — license attribution

Files prefixed `pngsuite-*` come from [PngSuite](http://www.schaik.com/pngsuite/) by Willem van Schaik. PngSuite is released into the public domain ("freely available; no copyright").

## Reference

> PngSuite, copyright (c) 1996, 2011 by Willem van Schaik.
> Permission to use, copy, modify, and distribute these graphics files
> for any purpose and without fee is hereby granted, provided that the
> above copyright notice appear in all copies and that both that
> copyright notice and this permission notice appear in supporting
> documentation.

Files used and their variants (from PngSuite docs):

| Local filename | PngSuite name | Variant |
|---|---|---|
| `pngsuite-basn0g01.png` | `basn0g01.png` | non-interlaced, grayscale, 1-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn0g08.png` | `basn0g08.png` | non-interlaced, grayscale, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn0g16.png` | `basn0g16.png` | non-interlaced, grayscale, 16-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn2c08.png` | `basn2c08.png` | non-interlaced, RGB, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn2c16.png` | `basn2c16.png` | non-interlaced, RGB, 16-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn3p01.png` | `basn3p01.png` | non-interlaced, paletted, 1-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn3p04.png` | `basn3p04.png` | non-interlaced, paletted, 4-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn3p08.png` | `basn3p08.png` | non-interlaced, paletted, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn4a08.png` | `basn4a08.png` | non-interlaced, grayscale+alpha, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn4a16.png` | `basn4a16.png` | non-interlaced, grayscale+alpha, 16-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn6a08.png` | `basn6a08.png` | non-interlaced, RGB+alpha, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basn6a16.png` | `basn6a16.png` | non-interlaced, RGB+alpha, 16-bit |
| `pngsuite-basi0g08.png` | `basi0g08.png` | Adam7-interlaced, grayscale, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basi2c08.png` | `basi2c08.png` | Adam7-interlaced, RGB, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basi3p08.png` | `basi3p08.png` | Adam7-interlaced, paletted, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-basi6a08.png` | `basi6a08.png` | Adam7-interlaced, RGB+alpha, 8-bit |
| `pngsuite-tbbn3p08.png` | `tbbn3p08.png` | paletted with tRNS (transparency) |
| `pngsuite-tp0n2c08.png` | `tp0n2c08.png` | transparent RGB |
| `pngsuite-cdsn2c08.png` | `cdsn2c08.png` | small dimension test |
| `pngsuite-s01n3p01.png` | `s01n3p01.png` | 1×1 paletted |
